title: Generate migration.mo to transition canister state from Version 16 schema to Version 12 schema

requirements.text: Generate backend/migration.mo that safely migrates existing canister stable state from the Version 16 schema back to the Version 12 schema. The migration must handle all stable variable shape differences between the two versions — including any added, removed, or restructured fields in types such as BlogPost, Project, Service, Skill, Lead, SeoSetting, SocialLink, Experience, and User — so that when the canister is upgraded and redeployed with the Version 12 main.mo, all existing data is preserved without data loss or deserialization errors.

quotes: Building the migration file to safely transition the canister state from the Version 16 schema back to the Version 12 schema, ensuring a stable upgrade without data loss when redeployed.

acceptanceCriteria: backend/migration.mo exists and compiles without errors alongside backend/main.mo
All stable variables present in the Version 16 schema that also exist in the Version 12 schema are correctly mapped and preserved
Fields that existed in Version 16 but not in Version 12 are safely dropped without causing upgrade panics
Fields that existed in Version 12 but were absent in Version 16 are initialized with appropriate default values
Type shape differences (e.g., optional vs non-optional fields, changed record structures) are explicitly handled with conversion logic
Canister can be upgraded from a Version 16 state to Version 12 main.mo without a trap or data wipe
All existing blog posts, projects, services, skills, leads, SEO settings, social links, experiences, and user records survive the upgrade intact

constraints: Do not modify backend/main.mo — it has already been restored to its Version 12 state
Do not modify any frontend files
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding new backend features or endpoints
Migrating forward to a newer schema version
